title: The Lab Corridors Become a Race
description: On pages 14–17, this part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Children, Unknown person #3, Punk Hazard Guards, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5. The central beat is the lab corridors become a race.
scene: The scene focuses on the lab corridors become a race, with Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Children, Unknown person #3, Punk Hazard Guards, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5 shaping the Punk Hazard conflict.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It's finally come together on this side!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: No, it's still getting bigger and bigger!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: There's someone down there below it!

dialogue.speaker: Punk Hazard Guards
dialogue.text: Master, we've sighted a massive gelatious creature!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: What the heck is that monster?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: hurry into the dragon sledge and ...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Ahhhh!! The Dragon is running away!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Someone's image just appeared in Midair!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: That's right! There's a good boy!

summary: The Lab Corridors Become a Race. This part advances Punk Hazard’s rescue mission, Caesar’s experiment, and the fragile pirate–Marine alliance.
